title: Update default API key for Pollinations.ai website
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: New keys to the garden
gist.blurb: Swapped out the default publishable API key on the frontend. Just some routine housekeeping to keep the pollen flowing.
gist.summary: Updated the default fallback publishable API key used by the frontend for direct API calls.
gist.impact: Ensures continued seamless access to the API for unauthenticated users by rotating the fallback key.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a shiny new golden key. A retro terminal or lock mechanism in the background. Represents updating access keys.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a shiny golden key next to a retro computer terminal glowing with lime green (#ecf874) code. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a shiny golden key next to a retro computer terminal glowing with lime green (#ecf874) code.
